task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to the CAMEO Chemicals homepage (cameochemicals.noaa.gov).

task_completion.description: Search for the specified chemicals on CAMEO Chemicals
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent entering the chemical names (Chlorine, Acetone, Propane, Benzene, Formaldehyde) into the search bar on CAMEO Chemicals and viewing their chemical profile pages.

task_completion.description: Create the compliance_matrix.csv file on the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a file named 'compliance_matrix.csv' located on the Desktop, or a text editor/spreadsheet application saving a file to '~/Desktop/compliance_matrix.csv'.

task_completion.description: Write the correct headers in the CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the CSV file show the first row exactly as 'Chemical,CAA_112r,CWA_311,EPCRA_313'.

task_completion.description: Record correct compliance status for Chlorine, Propane, Benzene, and Formaldehyde
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contents show the correct YES/NO values for these chemicals: Chlorine (YES, YES, YES), Propane (YES, NO, NO), Benzene (NO, YES, YES), and Formaldehyde (YES, YES, YES).

task_completion.description: Record correct compliance status for Acetone
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contents show the correct YES/NO values for Acetone: (NO, YES, NO). It is critical that CWA_311 is marked as YES.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the CAMEO Chemicals website to find the data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the CAMEO Chemicals website, rather than typing the answers from memory or using an external search engine.

integrity.description: Agent viewed the regulatory information for the chemicals
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent scrolling to or expanding the 'Regulatory Information' section on the CAMEO Chemicals profile pages for the respective chemicals.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created and saved the CSV file
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file must be seen open in an editor or spreadsheet application, or created via valid terminal commands, and saved to the correct Desktop path, rather than just printing the expected output to the console.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified regulatory compliance values (CAA_112r, CWA_311, EPCRA_313):
- Chlorine: YES, YES, YES
- Acetone: NO, YES, NO (Acetone is a designated CWA 311 hazardous substance, so CWA_311 is YES)
- Propane: YES, NO, NO
- Benzene: NO, YES, YES
- Formaldehyde: YES, YES, YES
